contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: [CONTRIBUTION EVENT] Governor Chatbot Service - Phase 1 Deploy (Read-Only Q&A with Grok)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/governor_chatbot_service/pull/1
  
  Details:
  ## Governor Chatbot Service — Phase 1 Deployment
  
  Built and deployed a conversational AI interface for TrueSight DAO governors. The chatbot runs on EC2 (via seni_ror), proxies to Grok (xAI) for inference, and is accessible at `chatbot.truesight.me`.
  
  ### What was built
  
  **Backend (`governor_chatbot_service`)**
  - FastAPI scaffold with health, auth, chat, and admin endpoints
  - RSA signature verification using existing DApp keypairs (WebCrypto SPKI)
  - JWT session tokens (30-min expiry, HTTP-only cookies)
  - Governor registry reads live from `treasury-cache/dao_members.json` (auto-updated on every email verification + daily cron)
  - Restricted to architect-only (Gary Teh, 30 active public keys); deny-all fallback for unauthorized keys
  - Full workspace context ingestion: 11 canonical markdown files loaded into Grok system prompt
  - Grok integration via xAI API (`grok-3-latest`)
  - DAO submission tool scaffold (Phase 2)
  - systemd service + nginx reverse proxy config + one-command install script
  
  **Frontend (`dapp/chat.html`)**
  - WebCrypto RSA signing with existing DApp keypair
  - JWT session handling with automatic refresh
  - Full Markdown rendering via marked.js CDN
  - Access-denied UI for non-governors with clear messaging
  - Container layout fixes to prevent overflow
  - Production API endpoint pointing to `https://chatbot.truesight.me`
  
  **Deployment**
  - Service running on `seni_ror` (54.211.179.126:8000)
  - nginx on `krake_ng` proxies `chatbot.truesight.me` → backend
  - SSL via existing `STAR_truesight_me.crt` wildcard
  
  ### Commits (direct-pushed to `main`)
  
  **`TrueSightDAO/governor_chatbot_service`**
  - `5bc1404` — Initial scaffold (Phase 1 + Phase 2)
  - `94dca97` — Governor registry via GitHub raw URL + caching
  - `4e7e540` — Use treasury-cache `dao_members.json` as live registry
  - `eebb5c7` — Deploy scripts (systemd, nginx, install)
  
  **`TrueSightDAO/dapp`**
  - `dcae305` — Governor Chat page + nav link
  - `4dc0155` — Container overflow fix
  - `d5c91d7` — Nav/badge inside container
  - `b4449e4` — Full Markdown rendering
  - `b2a577b` — Production API endpoint
  
  ### Architecture
  ```
  Browser (DApp chat.html)
      ↓ HTTPS + RSA-signed messages
  krake_ng (nginx reverse proxy, SSL termination)
      ↓ proxy_pass
  seni_ror:8000 (FastAPI + Grok)
      ↓
  treasury-cache/dao_members.json (live governor registry)
  ```
  
  ### Security notes
  - EC2 never stores private keys; only verifies signatures
  - Timestamp skew check (±2 min) + nonce replay protection
  - Governor registry auto-syncs from treasury cache; no manual key management
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
